page_metadata.biotools__summary: The web server PredCSF was developed by using modified one-versus-rest SVMs. The SVMs’input features are composed of physicochemical properties, evolutionary information, second structure and amino acid composition. Each SVM classifier’s output is the probability assigned to a superfamily.
